languages.text: {n}Исписанные убористым почерком, листы пестрят кляксами, помарками и размашистыми подчеркиваниями, выдающими страстную натуру владельца. Чернила выцвели и истлели, как и сами страницы — тонкий пергамент рассыпается в прах от неосторожного прикосновения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Исписанные убористым почерком, листы пестрят кляксами, помарками и размашистыми подчеркиваниями, выдающими страстную натуру владельца. Чернила выцвели и истлели, как и сами страницы — тонкий пергамент рассыпается в прах от неосторожного прикосновения.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The pages are filled with cramped writing, along with blots, crossings-out, and sweeping underlines that reveal the owner's passionate nature. The ink is as faded and decayed as the pages themselves, the thin parchment crumbling to dust at any careless touch.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Исписанные убористым почерком, листы пестрят кляксами, помарками и размашистыми подчеркиваниями, выдающими страстную натуру владельца. Чернила выцвели и истлели, как и сами страницы — тонкий пергамент рассыпается в прах от неосторожного прикосновения.{/n}

languages.text: {n}纸页上挤满密密麻麻的字迹，还有墨渍、涂改痕迹和长长的下划线，这无不暴露出主人激烈狂热的性格。墨水已像纸页一样褪色腐朽，稍一碰触，那纤薄的羊皮纸便会碎成粉末。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pages are filled with cramped writing, along with blots, crossings-out, and sweeping underlines that reveal the owner's passionate nature. The ink is as faded and decayed as the pages themselves, the thin parchment crumbling to dust at any careless touch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}纸页上挤满密密麻麻的字迹，还有墨渍、涂改痕迹和长长的下划线，这无不暴露出主人激烈狂热的性格。墨水已像纸页一样褪色腐朽，稍一碰触，那纤薄的羊皮纸便会碎成粉末。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las páginas están llenas de texto, tachones, manchas y subrayados que reflejan la naturaleza apasionada de su autor. La tinta está tan desgastada y débil como las propias páginas, cuyo pergamino prácticamente se deshace al tocarlo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pages are filled with cramped writing, along with blots, crossings-out, and sweeping underlines that reveal the owner's passionate nature. The ink is as faded and decayed as the pages themselves, the thin parchment crumbling to dust at any careless touch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las páginas están llenas de texto, tachones, manchas y subrayados que reflejan la naturaleza apasionada de su autor. La tinta está tan desgastada y débil como las propias páginas, cuyo pergamino prácticamente se deshace al tocarlo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les pages sont couvertes d'une écriture resserrée, accompagnée de tâches d'encre, de phrases raturées et de soulignages à grands traits qui révèlent la nature passionnée de l'auteur. L'encre est aussi altérée que les pages elles-mêmes, et le parchemin est devenu si friable qu'il menace de tomber en poussière à la moindre brusquerie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pages are filled with cramped writing, along with blots, crossings-out, and sweeping underlines that reveal the owner's passionate nature. The ink is as faded and decayed as the pages themselves, the thin parchment crumbling to dust at any careless touch.{/n}

L'encre est aussi altérée que les pages elles-mêmes, et le parchemin est devenu si friable qu'il menace de tomber en poussière à la moindre brusquerie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sayfalar, sahibinin tutkulu doğasını ortaya çıkaran lekeler, karalamalar ve uzun altı çizili kelimelerin yanı sıra sıkışık yazılarla dolu. Mürekkep, sayfaların kendisi kadar solmuş ve bozulmuş. İnce parşömen, dikkatsiz herhangi bir dokunuşta toza dönüşecek gibi ufalanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pages are filled with cramped writing, along with blots, crossings-out, and sweeping underlines that reveal the owner's passionate nature. The ink is as faded and decayed as the pages themselves, the thin parchment crumbling to dust at any careless touch.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sayfalar, sahibinin tutkulu doğasını ortaya çıkaran lekeler, karalamalar ve uzun altı çizili kelimelerin yanı sıra sıkışık yazılarla dolu. Mürekkep, sayfaların kendisi kadar solmuş ve bozulmuş. İnce parşömen, dikkatsiz herhangi bir dokunuşta toza dönüşecek gibi ufalanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Seiten sind eng beschrieben. Tintenklekse, durchgestrichene Passagen und Unterstreichungen offenbaren die leidenschaftliche Natur des Verfassers. Die Tinte ist verblasst und in einem ähnlich schlechten Zustand wie die Seiten selbst. Eine unachtsame Berührung, und das Pergament zerfällt zu Staub.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pages are filled with cramped writing, along with blots, crossings-out, and sweeping underlines that reveal the owner's passionate nature. The ink is as faded and decayed as the pages themselves, the thin parchment crumbling to dust at any careless touch.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ページはぎゅうぎゅうに詰まった文字で埋められ、インクの滲み、消し跡、そしてページ全体を覆うような下線で、その所有者の情熱的な性格が伺える。インクはページと同じように薄く、薄く、薄い羊皮紙は不注意な触れで粉々に崩れる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pages are filled with cramped writing, along with blots, crossings-out, and sweeping underlines that reveal the owner's passionate nature. The ink is as faded and decayed as the pages themselves, the thin parchment crumbling to dust at any careless touch.{/n}
